title: IT231R2 ARCHIVED - Partnerships - Partners not dealing at arm's length - Canada.ca

## IT231R2 ARCHIVED - Partnerships - Partners not dealing at arm's length

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
This bulletin discusses the sharing of income from partnerships by partners who do not deal with each other at arm's length including partnerships of spouse.
